summary: The diff implements all three requirements well. REQ-1 (HomePage with purple gradient, clock, gradient title, tagline, version/Discord info) is fully implemented in HomePage.tsx and index.css. REQ-2 (home icon button fixed bottom-left, navigation drawer with all pages) is implemented via HomeIconButton.tsx and NavigationDrawer.tsx. REQ-3 (HomePage as default landing view integrated in BrowserLayout) is implemented in BrowserLayout.tsx. One minor gap: REQ-1 specifies reusing the existing ClockWidget component, but the implementation creates a new inline HomeClockWidget instead. Additionally, the NavigationDrawer footer contains a Caffeine.ai referral link that was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reuse ClockWidget for the live clock at the top of HomePage
missing_requirements.reason: The spec says 'reuse ClockWidget' but HomePage.tsx defines its own inline HomeClockWidget component instead of importing and using the existing ClockWidget component.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai referral/attribution link in the NavigationDrawer footer
hallucinated_features.reason: The NavigationDrawer includes a footer with a Caffeine.ai referral link (utm_source=Caffeine-footer). This was not requested in any requirement.
